rulings.Case Title: EST. OF VELERSTEAN BEATRICE BARFIELD
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Melvin Wayne, the residue beneficiary, post-deceased; however, waivers of account have not been filed by all of his successors in interest, who are alleged to be his children. In addition, no allegation is made as to Melvin Wayne's spouse, who was listed in his death certificate as surviving him. 2) Filing fees have not been paid since the inception of this probate, despite there being real property in the estate. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARIA P CORPUS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. (1) Notice of Hearing was sent to the other heir, Doris, however, notice does not affirm that this petition is filed under Sec. 12200. (2) Petition does not describe the reason for delay of administration other than "intend" to sell. (3) No proposed Order submitted. LRSF 4.7. Objector needs to file a competing petition to propose another Administrator to be appointed. Counsels to update the court the status of case. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ARTURO S. PLEITEZ TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition 1) For Instructions Determining That The Proposed Actions Of The Trustees Are Not A Breach Of Trust, And 2)For An Order That The Beneficiary Vacate Property Partially Owned By The Trust
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1) In addition to the request for the Court's approval of the sale of the subject real property including the unit occupied by the income beneficiary, the petition requests declaratory relief that the petitioners as trustees will not violate their fiduciary duty by proceeding with the sale. 2) The petitioners request entry of judgment against the income beneficiary for possession of his unit within the subject real property, in reliance on the Vacate Agreement containing a provision purporting to be a stipulation for the judgment. Should the eviction issue be determined by a civil action under Probate Code section 856.5, as unlawful detainer applies to a licensee under CCP section 1161(1) & (6)? PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.
